# Nunchaku

## In-Game Text

- Every time you play 10 Attacks, gain 1 Energy.

---
<!-- META-AGENT NOTES — do not edit above this line -->
## Strategy Notes

- Stronger in attack-dense Ironclad decks; track the counter before playing low-impact Attacks so the Energy lands on a turn that can spend it.
- Multi-hit Attacks still count as one Attack played; Sword Boomerang benefits from the gained Energy only through extra card plays, not extra counter ticks.
